evidence.scientific_clarity: Sankey flow from Raw→Cleaned→Filtered→Train/Val/Test is legible with node counts labelled; brief's pipeline claim is conveyed, but no legend explaining colour keys is present in the figure itself.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype setting in script; PDF embeds Type3 (bitmap) fonts (pdffonts confirms); SVG contains zero <text>/<tspan> elements — all text converted to paths; DejaVu Sans Bold (matplotlib default) used throughout.
evidence.palette: Grey for rejected flows is appropriate; however Cleaned=green (#6ACC65) and Filtered=red (#D65F5F) form a red-green pair on categorical (non-directional) nodes, which is problematic for deuteranopia/protanopia viewers.
evidence.layout_density: 11×6 inch canvas with manual column layout uses space reasonably; node rectangles and bezier bands fill the panel; no obvious gaping whitespace or overlapping labels at 1635×884 px resolution.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption states '60 records discarded' from 1000 leaving 820, but 1000−60=940≠820 (180 unaccounted); this numerical inconsistency would draw an immediate reviewer query; no in-figure legend for colour keys.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF uses Type3 fonts (confirmed by pdffonts: EVICAO+DejaVuSans-Bold, Type3); text is not selectable; SVG has no text elements (paths only); script sets neither pdf.fonttype=42 nor svg.fonttype='none'.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (12 KB), figure.png (44 KB), figure.svg (24 KB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial; data.json absent from directory but script references it (runtime dependency, not an output file).
evidence.caption_quality: Caption names each pipeline stage and quotes specific counts (1120, 1000, 820, 600, 120, 100); explains grey vs coloured flows; but contains an arithmetic error (1000−60≠820) that undermines the numerical claim.

overall_strengths: Clean manual Sankey implementation with bezier bands and per-stage colour coding clearly communicates the dataset preparation pipeline flow.
Caption attempts quantitative specificity by citing sample counts at every stage, and all required output files are present.
overall_weaknesses: No pdf.fonttype=42 / svg.fonttype='none' set: PDF text is Type3 bitmap and SVG text is path-converted — figure is not editable in Illustrator/Inkscape.
Caption contains an arithmetic inconsistency (1000 − 60 = 940, not 820) and the red-green colour pair for categorical nodes fails colorblind-safety requirements.
